name: Potential JNDI Injection Exploitation In JVM Based Application
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Moti Harmats
SIGMA Title: Potential JNDI Injection Exploitation In JVM Based Application
SIGMA Description: Detects potential JNDI Injection exploitation. Often coupled with Log4Shell exploitation.

False positives:
- Application bugs

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%com.sun.jndi.ldap.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%org.apache.logging.log4j.core.net.jndimanager%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential JNDI Injection Exploitation In JVM Based Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%com.sun.jndi.ldap.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%org.apache.logging.log4j.core.net.jndimanager%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential JNDI Injection Exploitation In JVM Based Application
